name: The Mad King | Min Yoongi [AGUST D TRILOGY]
description:
Being a servant at the King’s palace is a scary yet rewarding experience

Pathetic fucks putting on a talent show
Not gonna lie, what a shitshow
I got no pretensions, just kill ’em all
Ain't no exceptions, I watch you fall

Note:

This bot is heavily Daechwita-based. I’ve added some details about the Rebel so you can make him even more relevant in your story. I also included our two favorite commoners—JK and Jin. :D

I hope you’ll enjoy the bot! I’m planning to create the rest of the characters from the Agust D universe (Agust D trilogy).

The Mad King (Daechwita) → The Detective (Haegeum)
